testcase.name: run[model.ApiCase@4efac082](1)
testcase.system-out: ========== API TEST ========== caseId: LOGIN001 module: 登录 apiName: 用户登录 method: GET url: http://10.6.20.233:8891/backend/zlt/teammate/login?userName=xxx&password= requestBody: responseBody: {"code":1001,"msg":"用户不存在","data":null} elapsedMs: 63 ==============================
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: run[model.ApiCase@1dd6d4b7](2)
testcase.system-out:
